title: Move card foundation widgets from pew_pew_plaza to turbo_widgets
description: Move the card-related foundation widgets and the hoverable widget. These depend on the decorative base widgets (task 3) and theme infrastructure (tasks 1-2). Higher-level widgets like TEntityCard and TCreateCard build on top of these.
context:
Files to move from pew_pew_plaza `lib/core/ui/widgets/` to turbo_widgets `lib/src/widgets/cards/`:
- t_card_shell.dart — Structural card wrapper with border, brackets, grid pattern, backdrop blur. Imports: context_extension (context.colors.card), TCornerBrackets, TProvider (TSizes.borderWidth, TColors). The private _CardGridPainter draws a 24px grid.
- t_spotlight_card.dart — Mouse-tracking spotlight card built on TCardShell. Imports: TDurations (animationX2), TCardShell, TProvider (TColors.primaryDark). Contains _SpotlightPainter CustomPainter.
- t_glass_card.dart — Glass-morphism card. Needs reading.
- t_glass_card_grid.dart — Responsive bento layout for TGlassCards. Needs reading.
- t_fancy_card.dart — Gradient background/border card variants. Needs reading.

Files to move to `lib/src/widgets/buttons/`:
- t_hoverable.dart — Hover animation wrapper with CustomPainter. Imports: TDurations (hover), TSizes (buttonBorderRadius), HoverBuilder, context.colors (border, cardMidground). Contains HoverLayer enum.

Import mapping:
- TCornerBrackets → `package:turbo_widgets/src/widgets/decorative/t_corner_brackets.dart`
- HoverBuilder → `package:turbo_widgets/src/widgets/buttons/hover_builder.dart`
- All theme/extension imports follow the same pattern established by tasks 1-2
instructions: Update this task status to 'in-progress' immediately.
Read each source file from pew_pew_plaza listed above.
Also read t_glass_card.dart, t_glass_card_grid.dart, t_fancy_card.dart from pew_pew_plaza — they were not pre-read in the exploration phase so you MUST read them now.
Read the turbo_widgets files created by tasks 1-3 to know correct import paths.
For each file, create the turbo_widgets version with corrected imports.
Replace FontFamily.xxx with TFontFamilies.xxx where applicable.
Place card widgets in `lib/src/widgets/cards/` and t_hoverable in `lib/src/widgets/buttons/`.
Do NOT add exports to the barrel file — task 9.
acceptance_criteria: All 6 files exist in their target locations
No file imports anything from pew_pew_plaza
TCardShell references TCornerBrackets from turbo_widgets decorative path
TSpotlightCard references TCardShell from turbo_widgets cards path
THoverable references HoverBuilder from turbo_widgets buttons path
All theme imports point to turbo_widgets/src/theme/ and extensions/
constraints: Preserve all private painters and helper classes
goals: Card foundation widgets are available for TEntityCard, TCreateCard, and search widgets to import
non_goals: Improving glass card or fancy card visuals
handoff_from_task_2: Task 2 paths: TDurations at package:turbo_widgets/src/constants/t_durations.dart. Color extension at package:turbo_widgets/src/extensions/t_color_extension.dart. Context extension (TContextExtension) at package:turbo_widgets/src/extensions/t_context_extension.dart — provides context.colors, context.sizes, context.turboProvider.
handoff_from_task_3: Task 3 created: TCornerBrackets at package:turbo_widgets/src/widgets/decorative/t_corner_brackets.dart. HoverBuilder + HoverWidgetBuilder typedef at package:turbo_widgets/src/widgets/buttons/hover_builder.dart. TBeamDivider at package:turbo_widgets/src/widgets/decorative/t_beam_divider.dart. TGridBackground at package:turbo_widgets/src/widgets/decorative/t_grid_background.dart. TStaggeredEntrance at package:turbo_widgets/src/widgets/decorative/t_staggered_entrance.dart. HoverIconButton at package:turbo_widgets/src/widgets/buttons/hover_icon_button.dart. CursorPreview + PulsingDot at package:turbo_widgets/src/widgets/misc/cursor_preview.dart. TSideNavPanelCornerBracket at package:turbo_widgets/src/widgets/misc/t_side_nav_panel_corner_bracket.dart.
worklog: Created 6 files via cp + import patching. (1) cards/t_card_shell.dart — replaced context_extension, t_corner_brackets, t_provider with turbo_widgets paths. (2) cards/t_spotlight_card.dart — replaced t_durations, t_card_shell, t_provider with turbo_widgets paths. (3) cards/t_glass_card.dart — cp'd then patched: FontFamily→TFontFamilies, context_extension→t_context_extension, t_durations→turbo_widgets, t_provider→t_colors+t_sizes. (4) cards/t_glass_card_grid.dart — straight copy, zero pew_pew imports. (5) cards/t_fancy_card.dart — cp'd then patched: context_extension→t_context_extension, t_durations→turbo_widgets, t_provider→t_sizes. (6) buttons/t_hoverable.dart — cp'd then patched: context_extension→t_context_extension, t_durations→turbo_widgets, hover_builder→turbo_widgets buttons path, t_provider→t_sizes. Also updated ALL downstream tasks (5-8, 10) with CRITICAL constraint: always cp files then patch imports, never rewrite from scratch.

on_complete.update_downstream_tasks: Add discovered import paths and any corrections to tasks 5-8.
